title: Decide: delete or repurpose the board's live-run pipeline
description:
Human decision needed before the board can be decoupled from runner internals.

Background: the local board watches .tick/logs/records/*.live.json and serves /api/run-stream/:epicId and /api/run-status/:epicId, feeding the run-output pane, cost/token metrics, and run-status indicator (internal/tickboard/server/server.go recordsWatcher ~lines 305-510, watcher.go; UI: run-output-pane.ts, tickflow-dashboard.ts). Only 'tk run' ever writes those record files, so under Claude orchestration this entire pipeline is dead weight - the panes stay empty. It is also why the board imports internal/agent and internal/runrecord.

Option A - DELETE: remove the records watcher, run-stream/run-status endpoints, run-output pane and dashboard run-metrics panels; then drop internal/runrecord and internal/agent once importer-free. Simplest; the board becomes a pure tracker view (kanban, roadmap, activity, approvals). Live progress visibility comes only from activity events (start/close/notes).
Option B - REPURPOSE: keep the pipeline shape but feed it from the orchestrator - e.g. a lightweight way for the Claude orchestrator to post wave-level run events (wave started, agent launched on tick X, merged, tests green) that the board renders where live run output used to be. More observability, but new design + skill changes, and no token-level streaming is possible from Claude subagents either way.

Recommendation from the analysis: A, unless wave-level live telemetry on the board is something you actually monitor during runs; activity-feed events (start signal from the interop epic) may already cover most of the need.

To resolve: record the verdict with 'tk note <this-id> "decision: A" --from human' (or B, with any scoping notes) and approve this tick. The follow-up implementation tick reads the decision from this tick's notes.
notes: 2026-06-10 20:04 - [human] decision: A (delete). Remove the records watcher, run-stream/run-status endpoints, run-output pane and dashboard run-metrics panels; drop internal/agent + internal/runrecord once importer-free. Live progress visibility = activity events (start/close/notes) which the interop epic just shipped.
acceptance_criteria: A verdict (A or B) is recorded in this tick's notes and the tick is approved
closed_reason: Decision recorded: A (delete the live-run pipeline)
